title: Server Bundle Download Flow
interaction_flow: build.js → createAllZips(distDir): triggers zip creation for all providers
createProviderZip → existsSync(providerDir): guard if dir missing
createProviderZip → archive.glob('**/*', {cwd:providerDir, dot:true, ignore:['**/.DS_Store']}): add files
CloudflareRoute → new URL(context.request.url): build asset URL
CloudflareRoute → url.pathname = '/_data/dist/{provider}.zip': rewrite to static asset path
CloudflareRoute → context.env.ASSETS.fetch(url): fetch pre-built zip from Cloudflare KV/Assets
ASSETS [not found] → response.ok==false → Response.json({error:'Bundle not found'}, 404)
CloudflareRoute → response.arrayBuffer(): read zip content into memory
CloudflareRoute → provider.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/g,'') → safeProvider: sanitize filename inline
CloudflareRoute → new Response(content, headers): stream zip to client

CloudflareRoute → Client: 200 Content-Type:application/zip, Content-Disposition:attachment filename=impeccable-style-{safeProvider}.zip, Cache-Control:public s-maxage=86400 stale-while-revalidate=3600
handleBundleDownload → isAllowedBundleProvider(provider): validate via BUNDLE_DOWNLOAD_PROVIDERS array
handleBundleDownload [invalid] → new Response('Invalid provider', 400): early return
handleBundleDownload [missing] → new Response('Bundle not found', 404): early return
handleBundleDownload → readFile(zipPath): read zip from disk
handleBundleDownload → sanitizeFilename(provider): uses validation.js helper (strips non-alphanumeric)
handleBundleDownload → new Response(content, headers): return zip
key_relationships: NodeServerRoute (server/index.js) delegates to handleBundleDownload from server/lib/api-handlers.js
handleBundleDownload imports isAllowedBundleProvider, sanitizeFilename from server/lib/validation.js
createProviderZip depends on archiver (npm) for cross-platform ZIP creation
error_cases: provider not in BUNDLE_DOWNLOAD_PROVIDERS → 400 Invalid provider
zip file not found on disk/assets → 404 Bundle not found
read error → 500 Error downloading bundle (Node path only)
important_notes: Two runtime paths exist: (1) Cloudflare Pages Functions at functions/api/download/bundle/[provider].js — fetches zip from ASSETS KV store using a rewritten URL; (2) Node/Bun dev server at server/index.js — reads zip from local dist/ filesystem. Both serve pre-built ZIPs created at build time by scripts/lib/zip.js using archiver. Only 'universal' and 'universal-prefixed' are valid bundle providers.
